import React,{useState,useEffect,useCallback}from"react";import{Stack,Box,Flex,xcss}from"@atlaskit/primitives";import{Label}from"@atlaskit/form";import SectionMessage from"@atlaskit/section-message";import{Loading}from"../Common/Loading";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";const toRate=function(v){let fallback=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:1;const n=Number(v);return isNaN(n)?fallback:n;};// --- STILER (Uendret) ---
const kpiBoxStyle=xcss({padding:"space.200",borderRadius:"border.radius.100",backgroundColor:"color.background.neutral.subtle",textAlign:"center",flex:"1 1 0px"// Gir lik bredde
});const kpiValueStyle=xcss({fontSize:"1.75rem",// 28px
fontWeight:"bold",paddingTop:"space.050"});// --- SLUTT PÅ STILER ---
const calculateExpectedValue=(O,M,P)=>{O=Math.max(0,O);M=Math.max(0,M);P=Math.max(0,P);// FIKS: Hvis alle verdiene er 0, er forventet verdi 0.
if(O===0&&M===0&&P===0){return 0;}// Hvis M mangler (er 0), men O og P finnes, bruk et gjennomsnitt
if(M===0)M=(O+P)/2;// Hvis O og P mangler (er 0), er M den eneste verdien
if(O===0&&P===0){return M;}return(O+4*M+P)/6;};const getNormalRandom=(mu,sigma)=>{let u=0,v=0;while(u===0)u=Math.random();// (0,1]
while(v===0)v=Math.random();let z=Math.sqrt(-2.0*Math.log(u))*Math.cos(2.0*Math.PI*v);return z*sigma+mu;};// --- HJELPEFUNKSJON 3 (OPPDATERT) ---
const calculatePercentiles=(data,numberOfRuns)=>{data.sort((a,b)=>a-b);return{p95:data[Math.floor(numberOfRuns*0.95)],p85:data[Math.floor(numberOfRuns*0.85)],p50:data[Math.floor(numberOfRuns*0.5)],p35:data[Math.floor(numberOfRuns*0.35)],// <-- NYTT

const runSimulation=useCallback(()=>{setIsSimulating(true);setSimulationSummary(null);setTimeout(()=>{const NUMBER_OF_RUNS=10000;const costResults=[];const benefitResults=[];const timeResults=[];for(let i=0;i<NUMBER_OF_RUNS;i++){let runTotalCost=0;let runTotalBenefit=0;let runTotalTime=0;for(const goal of items){var _vals$costOptimistic,_vals$costPessimistic,_vals$timeOptimistic,_vals$timePessimistic,_properties$evaluatio,_vals$benefitPessimis,_vals$benefitOptimist;const vals=goal.issueCost;if(!vals)continue;// --- Simulering for KOSTNAD ---
const M_Cost=vals.cost||1;const O_Cost=(_vals$costOptimistic=vals.costOptimistic)!==null&&_vals$costOptimistic!==void 0?_vals$costOptimistic:M_Cost;const P_Cost=(_vals$costPessimistic=vals.costPessimistic)!==null&&_vals$costPessimistic!==void 0?_vals$costPessimistic:M_Cost;const muCost=calculateExpectedValue(O_Cost,M_Cost,P_Cost);const sigmaCost=(P_Cost-O_Cost)/6;let randomCost=sigmaCost>0?getNormalRandom(muCost,sigmaCost):muCost;randomCost=Math.max(O_Cost,Math.min(P_Cost,randomCost));runTotalCost+=randomCost;// --- Simulering for TID ---
const M_Time=vals.time||1;const O_Time=(_vals$timeOptimistic=vals.timeOptimistic)!==null&&_vals$timeOptimistic!==void 0?_vals$timeOptimistic:M_Time;const P_Time=(_vals$timePessimistic=vals.timePessimistic)!==null&&_vals$timePessimistic!==void 0?_vals$timePessimistic:M_Time;const muTime=calculateExpectedValue(O_Time,M_Time,P_Time);const sigmaTime=(P_Time-O_Time)/6;let randomTime=sigmaTime>0?getNormalRandom(muTime,sigmaTime):muTime;randomTime=Math.max(O_Time,Math.min(P_Time,randomTime));runTotalTime+=randomTime;// --- Simulering for NYTTE ---
const properties=goal.properties;const M_Benefit=(properties===null||properties===void 0?void 0:(_properties$evaluatio=properties.evaluation_points)===null||_properties$evaluatio===void 0?void 0:_properties$evaluatio.value)||0;const P_Benefit=(_vals$benefitPessimis=vals.benefitPessimistic)!==null&&_vals$benefitPessimis!==void 0?_vals$benefitPessimis:M_Benefit;const O_Benefit=(_vals$benefitOptimist=vals.benefitOptimistic)!==null&&_vals$benefitOptimist!==void 0?_vals$benefitOptimist:M_Benefit;const muBenefit=calculateExpectedValue(P_Benefit,M_Benefit,O_Benefit);const sigmaBenefit=(O_Benefit-P_Benefit)/6;let randomBenefit=sigmaBenefit>0?getNormalRandom(muBenefit,sigmaBenefit):muBenefit;randomBenefit=Math.max(P_Benefit,Math.min(O_Benefit,randomBenefit));runTotalBenefit+=randomBenefit;}costResults.push(runTotalCost);benefitResults.push(runTotalBenefit);timeResults.push(runTotalTime);}// --- Beregn percentiler for hver metrikk ---
